Package space.sunqian.fs.object.pool

Class SimplePool.Builder<T>

java.lang.Object
space.sunqian.fs.object.pool.SimplePool.Builder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of objects in the pool
Enclosing interface:
SimplePool<T>
public static class SimplePool.Builder<T> extends Object
Builder class for SimplePool.

    • supplier

      @Nonnull public @Nonnull SimplePool.Builder<T> supplier(@Nonnull @Nonnull Supplier<? extends @Nonnull T> supplier)

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      this builder

      Returns:
      this builder

      @Nonnull public @Nonnull SimplePool.Builder<T> discarder(@Nonnull @Nonnull Consumer<? super @Nonnull T> discarder)

      Parameters:

      Returns:

    • coreSize

      @Nonnull public @Nonnull SimplePool.Builder<T> coreSize(int coreSize) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Sets the core size of the pool.
      Parameters:
      coreSize - the core size of the pool
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if coreSize is less than or equal to 0

    • maxSize

      @Nonnull public @Nonnull SimplePool.Builder<T> maxSize(int maxSize) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Sets the max size of the pool.
      Parameters:
      maxSize - the max size of the pool
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if maxSize is less than coreSize

    • idleTimeout

      @Nonnull public @Nonnull SimplePool.Builder<T> idleTimeout(long idleTimeoutMillis) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Sets the idle timeout in milliseconds of the pool.
      Parameters:
      idleTimeoutMillis - the idle timeout in milliseconds of the pool
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if idleTimeout is less than or equal to 0

    • idleTimeout

      @Nonnull public @Nonnull SimplePool.Builder<T> idleTimeout(@Nonnull @Nonnull Duration idleTimeout) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Sets the idle timeout in milliseconds of the pool.
      Parameters:
      idleTimeout - the idle timeout in milliseconds of the pool
      Returns:
      this builder
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if idleTimeout is less than or equal to 0

    • build

      @Nonnull public <T1 extends T> @Nonnull SimplePool<T1> build() throws IllegalArgumentException
      Builds a SimplePool instance. If some exception occurs during the initialization, a closed pool with unreleased objects (if any) will be returned.
      Type Parameters:
      T1 - the type of objects in the pool, it is used to pass the generic type in method-chaining
      Returns:
      the built SimplePool instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if supplier is not set
